allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("setup-github.cmd"\); Write-Output \("Size: " + $bytes.Length + " bytes"\); Write-Output \("First 3 bytes \(BOM check\): " + \($bytes[0..2] -join ','\)\); $hasBOM = \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\); Write-Output \("UTF-8 BOM: " + $hasBOM\); $crlfCount = 0; $lfOnlyCount = 0; for \($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0x0A\) { if \($i -gt 0 -and $bytes[$i-1] -eq 0x0D\) { $crlfCount++ } else { $lfOnlyCount++ } } }; Write-Output \("CRLF lines: " + $crlfCount\); Write-Output \("LF-only lines: " + $lfOnlyCount\))

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("setup-github.cmd"\); $crlfCount = 0; $lfOnlyCount = 0; for \($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0x0A\) { if \($i -gt 0 -and $bytes[$i-1] -eq 0x0D\) { $crlfCount++ } else { $lfOnlyCount++ } } }; Write-Output \("CRLF lines: " + $crlfCount + " | LF-only: " + $lfOnlyCount\))
